parameters.jsCode:
return [{ json: {
  feedPatterns: ['sun[-\\s]?times'],
  skipPattern: 'obituar|dies at|dead at|in memoriam|death notice|horoscope|dear abby|crossword|puzzle|comics|murder|homicide|shooting|shot |stabb|fatal|killed|slain|body found|carjack|\\bbeaten\\b',
  priorityPattern: '\\btrans\\b|transgender|gender-affirming|nonbinary|non-binary|lgbt|drag show|drag brunch',
  dedupThreshold: 0.5,
  snippetWords: 40,
  sections: ['week', 'weekend'],
  maxItems: { week: 6, weekend: 6 },
  maxWordsPerBullet: 18,
  systemPrompt: 'You write ultra-concise dashboard digests as JSON. /no_think',
  userPromptTemplate: 'From this week\'s Chicago Sun-Times articles, build a "Chicago Happenings" digest as JSON. "week": at most {{MAX_WEEK}} bullets, top local stories, especially city/state politics. "weekend": at most {{MAX_WEEKEND}} bullets, events, openings, games, and closures happening Sat {{SAT}} or Sun {{SUN}}. Each bullet is ONE plain sentence, {{MAX_WORDS}} words max, rewritten in your own words -- never copy article text, no dates, no markers. Articles tagged [P] are priority: always include them first in their section (drop the tag). Skip national wire stories.\n\n{{ENTRIES}}'
} }];

const s = $getWorkflowStaticData('global');
return [{ json: s.digest ?? { week: [], weekend: [], updated: null } }];
